title: SILVA 138.2 SSURef NR99 (main taxonomic ranks only) formatted for phyloFlash
author: Seah, Brandon K. B.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Small-subunit ribosomal RNA reference database from SILVA release 138.2, (taxonomy with main ranks only) formatted for use with phyloFlash (https://github.com/HRGV/phyloFlash) (version >=3.4). phyloFlash is a pipeline for rapid screening and targeted assembly of SSU rRNA sequences from short-read metagenomic or transcriptomic datasets. 
 Please see README.md for more details and license information.
steps_raw:
Small-subunit ribosomal RNA reference database from SILVA release 138.2, (taxonomy with main ranks only) formatted for use with phyloFlash (https://github.com/HRGV/phyloFlash) (version >=3.4). phyloFlash is a pipeline for rapid screening and targeted assembly of SSU rRNA sequences from short-read metagenomic or transcriptomic datasets. 
 Please see README.md for more details and license information.
